para_trans: Employees should be allowed to participate in the revised National Pension Scheme of the state government.
regarding the extension of the option.
Government Decision No: SENIVE 2024 / Q. 54 / SERVICE-4,
Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Marg,
Read: 1) Government Decision, Finance Department No: SENIWAY-2024 / Q. 54 / SERVICE-4, D. 20.09.2024.
2) Government Decisions, Finance Department No: SENIVE-2024 / P.No.54 / SERVICE-4, D. 28.03.2025.
Revised National Pension System for Employees of State Governments
To participate in a pension plan. 31.03.2026 In the context of the suggestion to give the option before
The governments of No. 2 are given by decree. Now to present this option.
The revised deadline is being extended till 31.12.2026.
The decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.in website.
